message:
perf(buffer): add #[inline] to buffer hot-path accessors (bd-1o91x)

Add #[inline] to cleanup_overlap (called from set/set_fast), content_height,
fill, clear, and clear_with to allow cross-crate inlining of frequently-called
buffer methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
